chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Appeal No. S – 99 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of MA No.1795/2024 29.04.2024 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Laghari, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Application is allowed by consent, and the share of Diyat of minor Dhani Bux (applicant), who has now become major, be disbursed to him through a crossed cheque on due verification and identification in accordance with law. Application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Abdul Basit
